events.notes: Genesis airdrop distributed at TGE to early users of the Hyperliquid platform (no vesting, immediate).
Hyper Foundation allocation received at TGE; specific internal vesting schedule not publicly disclosed.
Future community rewards / Assistance Fund held for ongoing emissions; exact emission rate schedule not fully published.

Team allocation locked for at least 1 year from TGE (earliest unlock ~Nov 2025); granular vesting cliff/linear schedule beyond the 1-year minimum lock has NOT been publicly disclosed in free sources — date shown is the earliest possible unlock, not a confirmed full-release date.
Community grants allocation (~0.3%); distribution timeline not specified.

summary: Hyperliquid (HYPE) launched in November 2024 with no VC or outside investor allocations — a notable structural difference from most tokens. The largest immediate unlock pressure came from the 31% genesis airdrop distributed at TGE. The most significant future unlock risk is the ~23.9% team allocation, which is locked for at least one year (earliest: ~November 2025), but the precise vesting curve beyond that minimum lock has not been publicly disclosed in granular form. The ~38.9% community/emissions pool represents slow, ongoing sell pressure over time rather than a cliff event.
caveats: 1) The team vesting schedule beyond the stated '1-year minimum lock' has not been published in a granular cliff+linear format in any free public source (tokenunlocks.app, Messari free tier, CryptoRank free tier) as of the research date — the 2025-11-29 date is the EARLIEST possible team unlock, not a confirmed schedule. 2) The Assistance Fund / future emissions release cadence is not broken into dated tranches in public docs. 3) tokenunlocks.app may have more granular data behind a paywall. 4) No investor tranches exist (Hyperliquid was self-funded), so investor_unlock category is absent by design.
